name: Macaroni Salad for 100
recipeIngredient: 2 bags Frozen peas, thawed (-20 ounces each)
2 cans Pitted ripe olives, drained and sliced
1 bottle Western or French salad dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ham, macaroni, cheddar cheese, peas, celery, onions, and olives in a large bowl.
2. Mix well to ensure all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the dressing ingredients: mayonnaise, salad dressing, vinegar, sugar, light cream, onion salt, garlic salt, salt, and pepper.
4. Pour the dressing over the ham mixture and toss gently until well coated.
5. Refrigerate the salad to allow flavors to meld before serving.
